answers: Unity is one of the most popular game engines in the world. It uses C# programming language and supports 2D, 3D, AR, and VR game development across all major platforms.
Unity holo game development engine — 2D, 3D, mobile, PC, console shob platform er game banano jay. C# language use kore. Among Us, Hollow Knight — shob Unity te banano.
Unity is free for individuals and small studios earning under $100K/year. To learn, start with Unity's official tutorials, then try making simple games like Pong or a platformer to build skills.
Unity uses C# for scripting and has a massive Asset Store with ready-made assets. It's great for indie games, mobile games, and AR/VR projects. The community and documentation are excellent.
